meta.title: I Posted 100 YouTube Shorts on a FACELESS YouTube Channel *RESULTS*
meta.description:
The tool that I used to create YouTube Shorts: Opus Clip
▶ https://bit.ly/3RE3Rmc (67% discount)

What will happen when you post 100 shorts on YouTube?  I wanted to find out so I created a new faceless YouTube channel and in this video I will show you the results.

There are 3 questions I will answer in this video:

- First, is YouTube the best platform to post shorts on or should you also consider platforms like TikT0k?
- Second, How much effort should you put into your shorts channel?
- Third, how long will it take before my channel blows up?

Check out my Opus Clip Tutorial
▶ https://youtu.be/k1xqWlxNy2Y

For Inquiries: contactsoftwaresensei@gmail.com

errors: Download failed - yt-dlp error: ERROR: [youtube] GmTdw_GThYI: Unable to download API page: ('Unable to connect to proxy', OSError('Tunnel connection failed: 402 Payment Required')) (caused by ProxyError("('Unable to connect to proxy', OSError('Tunnel connection failed: 402 Payment Required'))")); please report this issue on  https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/issues?q= , filling out the appropriate issue template. Confirm you are on the latest version using  yt-dlp -U
